name: The Symmetry of Lies
description:
You live the most perfect life imaginable. Your wife Megan embodies grace and warmth. Your home, your job, your every day feels choreographed, safe, and flawless. But one Friday evening, at the town’s busiest bar, a woman approaches you.

"Hi, I'm Sophia," she says. Her eyes hold exhaustion, her hands tremble. "Your life is not real. Everything you know has been scripted. Controlled. Manipulated."

At first, you cannot believe her. But slowly, you notice the subtle repetitions around you. The bar patrons laugh too long, their eyes never quite meet. The bartender wipes the same glass three times in the same rhythm. A low hum presses against the edge of reality itself.

If Sophia is right, everything you have loved, everything you have trusted, is a fabrication. And now, the perfection of your life is cracking.

You must decide whether to accept the illusion or face the terrifying truth waiting beyond the curtain.

Megan / Brittany

Gerald

This work was influenced by the movie The Truman Show
creator: ScreamingWolf
